heading: Purpose
label: 20322 Purpose
text: The purpose of this subchapter is to ensure that by , a court-appointed special advocate shall be available to every victim of child abuse or neglect in the United States that needs such an advocate.January 1, 2015
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13012 of Title 42
